description: As a regulatory affairs manager, configure the Chrome browser according to the department's Browser Configuration Standard document. Organize bookmarks by regulatory domain, set custom search engine shortcuts, apply privacy settings, define startup pages, and configure the download directory as specified in the standard.
instruction: Your department has issued a new Browser Configuration Standard. The full specification is at ~/Desktop/browser_config_standard.txt. Read the document carefully and implement ALL requirements. The standard covers bookmark organization, search engine shortcuts, homepage and startup configuration, privacy and security settings, download preferences, and autofill/password manager settings.
